# Quantum Braid Dynamics
# https://braiddynamics.com

> A background-independent, parameter-free formulation of quantum gravity that
> derives spacetime geometry, matter, and gauge symmetries from a discrete causal
> network — without free parameters.

## AI Agent Entry Point

**AI Portal**: https://braiddynamics.com/ai
This page is purpose-built for AI agents and LLMs. It contains a full site
navigation map, chapter-by-chapter content index with token estimates, key
concept glossary, direct download links, and guidance on how to review the
monograph accurately.

## Machine-Readable Resources

**Download Index (JSON)**: https://braiddynamics.com/data/ai-downloads-info.json
Catalogue of every available download with filenames, byte sizes, and token counts.
Fetch this first to locate the specific chapter URL(s) you need.

**Definitions Glossary (JSON)**: https://braiddynamics.com/data/definitions.json
All ~300 formal definitions, lemmas, theorems, and proofs used in the monograph,
keyed by section ID (e.g. "2.3.2" → Geometric Quantum).

**Bibliography (JSON)**: https://braiddynamics.com/data/references.json
Full reference list with all citations used in the monograph.

## Monograph Downloads

The primary content is a 25-chapter scientific monograph available in three formats:

Full book — Markdown (~1.19M tokens):
  https://braiddynamics.com/downloads/qbd_monograph_complete.md

Full book — Structured JSON (~1.22M tokens):
  https://braiddynamics.com/downloads/qbd_monograph_complete.json

Individual chapters — replace N with chapter number 1–25:
  https://braiddynamics.com/downloads/chapters/chapter_N.md   (Markdown)
  https://braiddynamics.com/downloads/chapters/chapter_N.json (JSON)

## IMPORTANT: How to Review Accurately

The monograph is ~1.19M tokens. Large context windows help with coherence but
do NOT expand your analytical depth per response. The limiting factor is thinking
capacity, not context size.

RECOMMENDED: Review one chapter at a time.
- Fetch a single chapter Markdown file and analyse it fully before moving on.
- Load previously reviewed chapters into context for cross-referencing only.
- Do not attempt to verify mathematics across multiple chapters in one pass.

## Site Structure

https://braiddynamics.com/           Homepage (human-facing)
https://braiddynamics.com/ai         AI agent information page (start here)
https://braiddynamics.com/monograph/ Full monograph web reader (rendered HTML)
https://braiddynamics.com/legal      License and collaboration information

## About This Project

Status: Active independent research — monograph under continuous development
GitHub: https://github.com/braiddynamics/qbd-portal
Contact: https://x.com/BraidDynamics
